zh.lifeSummary: 當Marmaduke Lumley於1314年9月14日出生在英國英格蘭諾圖波藍德設分頓 查阿培爾利時，他的父親Robert Lumley50歲，母親Lucia de Thwenge35歲。他和Margaret De Holland至少有6個兒子和1個女兒。他去世於1365年9月26日在英國達勒姆盧姆利享年51歲。

nameMeanings.name: Lumley
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (northern): habitational name from Lumley, a place in County Durham, so named from Old English lum(m) ‘pool’ (see Lum 1) + lēah ‘woodland clearing’.

variants.name: Lum
meanings: English: habitational name from Lumb in Lancashire. In some instances the name may be topographic for someone who lived by a pool, Middle English lum(m).
Chinese: variant Romanization of the surnames 林 (see   Lin   1) and 藍 (see   Lan   1), based on their Cantonese pronunciations.

variants.name: Lemley
meanings: Perhaps an altered form of English   Lumley  .

nameMeanings.name: Marmaduke
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Of uncertain derivation. It is generally held to be an Anglicized form of the Old Irish name Mael-Maedóc ‘devotee of Maedóc’. The name Maedóc was borne by various early Irish saints, most notably a 6th-century abbot of Clonmore and a 7th-century bishop of Ferns. Mael-Maedóc Ó Morgair ( 1095–1148 ) was a reformer of the Church in Ireland and a friend of Bernard of Clairvaux. However, the modern Gaelic form (from c.1200 ) is Maol-Maodhóg (pronounced ‘mul-may-og’), so that the name would have had to have been borrowed into English before this loss of the d. Marmaduke has never been common except in Yorkshire, where for example it was bourne by Marmaduke Huby , abbot of Fountains, ( 1495–1526 ). Its most notable bearer in recent times has been Marmaduke Hussey ( 1923–2006 ), a former chairman of the governors of the BBC.

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

en.lifeSummary: When Marmaduke Lumley was born on 14 September 1314, in Chevington Chapelry, Northumberland, England, United Kingdom, his father, Robert Lumley, was 50 and his mother, Lucia de Thwenge, was 35. He had at least 6 sons and 1 daughter with Margaret De Holland. He died on 26 September 1365, in Lumley, Durham, England, at the age of 51.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Marmaduke Lumley est né le 14 septembre 1314, à Chevington Chapelry, Northumberland, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Robert Lumley, avait 50 ans et sa mère, Lucia de Thwenge, avait 35 ans. Il a eu au moins 6 fils et 1 fille avec Margaret De Holland. Il est décédé le 26 septembre 1365, à Lumley, Durham, Angleterre, à l’âge de 51 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Marmaduke Lumley am 14. September 1314 in Chevington Chapelry, Northumberland, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Robert Lumley 50 und seine Mutter Lucia de Thwenge 35. Er hatte mit Margaret De Holland mindestens 6 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb am 26. September 1365 im Alter von 51 Jahren in Lumley, Durham, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Marmaduke Lumleyが1314年9月14日にイギリスイギリスノースウンバーランドチェヴィントン チャペルリーで生まれた時，父Robert Lumleyは50歳，母Lucia de Thwengeは35歳であった。彼はMargaret De Hollandとの間に少なくとも6人の息子と1人の娘をもうけた。彼は1365年9月26日にイギリスダルハムルムリーで51歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Marmaduke Lumley(이)가 1314년 9월 14일 영국 잉글랜드 노르스벌랜드 처빙턴 차플리에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Robert Lumley(은)는 50세였고, 그의 어머니 Lucia de Thwenge(은)는 35세였다. 그는 Margaret De Holland(와)과 적어도 여섯 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1365년 9월 26일 영국 뒤람 럼리에서 51세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Marmaduke Lumley родился 14 сентября 1314 г. в местности чевингтон чапелри, нортумбирланд, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Robert Lumley было 50 лет, а матери, которую звали Lucia de Thwenge, 35. У него было по крайней мере 6 сыновей и 1 дочь от Margaret De Holland. Он умер 26 сентября 1365 г. в местности лумли, дурам, Англия в возрасте 51 год.
